subject: fix(ui): improve burger menu close UX and swap card interaction timing
body:
Burger menu now closes smoothly when tapping outside — semi-transparent
backdrop makes it obvious the overlay is dismissible. Replaced hidden
attribute toggle with CSS opacity/scale transitions for smooth open/close
animation. Card border now highlights first (immediate), then links
become prominent after a 120ms delay, matching user expectation of
"selection confirmed, then actions revealed."

Tags: ui, ux, animation, burger-menu, cards
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: portfolio-ux
Semver: patch
